rationale: Bible s.2.2 mandates 'Hub 2D → Choix biome → Choix Ogham' but code went straight from BiomeRadial to 3D scene without any ogham selection. This is a critical core loop gap — the player never got to choose their rune. C26 bug hunt revealed BiomeRadial hover panel was a ghost feature (status claimed done, code never actually committed). Logged for next cycle.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C27: verify OghamSelector renders correctly on mobile (scroll behavior, card sizing, touch targets). Fix C26 ghost: implement BiomeRadial hover info panel. Feature candidates: implement oghams.equipped reading in BroceliandeForest3D (wire active ogham into WalkHUD display), or word-field minigame skeleton.
